name: traffic-simulator
description: Interactive browser traffic simulation for road capacity, signal timing, incidents, and bus priority experiments.

scripts.check: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/simulation.js && node --check scripts/build-check.js && node --check scripts/serve.js && node --check playwright.config.js && node --check test/simulation.test.js && node --check test/e2e/app.spec.js
